nasb.text: Do you not understand that everything that goes into the mouth passes into the stomach, and is eliminated?

esv.text: Do you not see that whatever goes into the mouth passes into the stomach and is expelled?

cnv.text: 難道不知道一切進到口裡的，是進到肚腹，然後排泄到外面去嗎？

ccb.text: 岂不知入口的东西都是进到肚子里，然后排泄到厕所里吗？

csbs.text: 你们难道不明白：一切进入口里的，要进到肚子，然后被排到厕所；
